title: Dopamine Exaggerated 3D Cartoon Character Illustration AI
sourceTitle: Dopamine Exaggerated 3D Cartoon Character Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Standalone dopamine 3D cartoon illustration of tiny-headed chubby cartoon skater with super-long limbs, huge hands, and bulky shoes, built as a playful soft-toy sculpture moment. Subject: tiny-headed chubby cartoon skater with super-long limbs, huge hands, and bulky shoes is caught in slightly off-balance mid-jump kick pose with playful tension, with tiny head, chubby torso, super-long limbs, huge hands, bulky shoes, and a silhouette that feels plump, springy, and deliberately non-realistic. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Single standalone image, not a storyboard: character centered in a dramatic off-balance jump, with stars, wavy lines, spheres, cubes, sticker icons, and abstract soft-rubber shapes orbiting the body to amplify motion and graphic energy. Signature Elements: specific mood variant with readable visual details expressed through huge hands, long limbs, bulky shoes, soft 3D props, playful tension, and tactile handmade surfaces. Style: Editorial exaggerated cartoon 3D illustration with matte rubber, fuzzy textile, knitted detail, clay-like handmade feel, subtle fiber grain, and soft-toy sculpture tactility. Color Palette: Vibrant dopamine palette with high saturation, bold flat color fills, strong contrasts, vivid but not neon-overexposed. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Dopamine Exaggerated 3D Cartoon Character Illustration Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Standalone dopamine 3D cartoon illustration of round-bodied cartoon courier with noodle-thin arms, huge mitt-like hands, and oversized boots, built as a playful soft-toy sculpture moment. Subject: round-bodied cartoon courier with noodle-thin arms, huge mitt-like hands, and oversized boots is caught in caught in a sideways leap while trying to balance a tiny package, with tiny head, chubby torso, super-long limbs, huge hands, bulky shoes, and a silhouette that feels plump, springy, and deliberately non-realistic. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Single standalone image, not a storyboard: character centered in a dramatic off-balance jump, with paper arrows, rubber clouds, small blocks, music-note icons, and bouncing spheres orbiting the body to amplify motion and graphic energy. Signature Elements: specific mood variant with readable visual details expressed through huge hands, long limbs, bulky shoes, soft 3D props, playful tension, and tactile handmade surfaces. Style: Editorial exaggerated cartoon 3D illustration with matte rubber, fuzzy textile, knitted detail, clay-like handmade feel, subtle fiber grain, and soft-toy sculpture tactility. Color Palette: Vibrant dopamine palette with high saturation, bold flat color fills, strong contrasts, vivid but not neon-overexposed. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
